title: Painter

rationales.taskAutomation: Surface prep and application are manual craft; only estimating from photos/measurements and scheduling are automatable.
rationales.toolMaturity: AI-assisted paint-estimating apps (photo-to-square-footage, color visualization) are credible and improving.
rationales.adoption: Adoption is growing among larger residential and commercial painting companies for bidding; small crews remain manual.
rationales.agenticExposure: An agent can generate a quote from a photo and floor plan, not prep a wall or cut a clean line.

tasksAtRisk: Estimate generation from photos and floor plans
tasksGrowing: Surface prep and repair judgment on damaged substrates
salarySource: BLS OES May 2023, SOC 47-2141, p25-p75 rounded
insight: Painting's exposure is modest and concentrated in bidding: AI photo-to-estimate tools are gaining real traction with larger companies, while surface prep and application stay a hands-on craft.
